analysis.consistency: High. The spell description is internally consistent, detailing creation, triggering, performance, limitations (size, duration), and dispelling/discovery methods.
analysis.quality: Good. The spell provides a highly flexible utility tool focused on setting complex, conditional triggers for illusions, offering excellent potential for creative problem-solving and traps.

mechanics.level_appropriateness: Level 6 seems appropriate for a spell that can set a complex, conditional illusion lasting up to 5 minutes upon triggering, offering significant tactical potential.
mechanics.casting_time: 1 action is standard and balanced for setting up such a persistent effect.
mechanics.range: 120 feet allows for setup in safe locations.
mechanics.duration: Until dispelled implies it remains ready to trigger indefinitely, balanced by the 5-minute performance limit and subsequent 10-minute dormancy.
mechanics.components: The material component (fleece and jade dust worth 25 gp) suggests a moderate resource sink suitable for a higher-level utility spell.
mechanics.trigger_mechanism: The visual/audible condition within 30 feet is specific enough to prevent abuse while remaining highly customizable. The required investigation check (DC = Spell Save DC) is the standard method for discerning illusions.
mechanics.performance_limitations: The 5-minute performance time and subsequent 10-minute cooldown after performance introduce necessary limits on continuous usage.
